Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Total time between Accepted + In Progress and Accepted + Wait
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Average time it takes Accepted + Wait to be completed after Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Minimum time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait in variants where Completed + In Call occurs later in the trace
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time between Accepted + Wait and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total time until Accepted + Wait is performed after the first Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait when the case includes Completed + In Call before or after it
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + Resolved in traces containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time between Accepted + Wait and Completed + In Call when both appear in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average cycle time of Accepted + Wait in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: Minimum elapsed time from the start of the case to Accepted + Wait in traces that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case
